utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Each one is fully specified with the required details: the property has type, price, currency, size, accessibility features, etc.; financing has method, amount, currency, and status; legal_services has service name, cost, currency, duration, and status; moving_services has level, specialization, cost, currency, and status; setup_services specifies utility_package, included services, cost, currency, timeline, and status; total_budget breaks down property cost, services cost, grand total, currency, and confirmation. All items are complete and meet the expected detail level.
